steps: Multiply g(x) · h(x) = (3/5 x + 7/6)(6x − 5) by distributing each term: (3/5 x)(6x) = 18x²/5, (3/5 x)(−5) = −3x, (7/6)(6x) = 7x, (7/6)(−5) = −35/6.
choiceElimination:
• Choice A — '18x²/5 − 35/6': Missing the 4x middle term. The inner and outer products (−3x and +7x) sum to +4x, not zero. ✗
  • Choice B — '18x²/5 + 27x/11 − 35/6': 27x/11 is not produced by any combination of the given fractions; −3x + 7x = 4x, not 27x/11. ✗
  • Choice C — '18x²/5 − 4x − 35/6': Sign on the x-term is wrong. Outer is −3x, inner is +7x, giving +4x not −4x. ✗
  • Choice D — '18x²/5 + 4x − 35/6': Matches exactly: 18x²/5 + 4x − 35/6. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
